description_long: This is a modern office building characterized by a series of stacked, offset rectangular volumes, each slightly rotated to create a dynamic, tiered appearance. The facade is clad in dark blue or black panels with long, narrow vertical windows arranged in a highly regular, repetitive pattern across each floor. The uppermost level features a rooftop area with what appears to be solar panels and mechanical equipment, suggesting a focus on sustainability. The base of the building is set on a lighter, concrete-like plinth, providing a visual contrast to the darker upper stories. The building's overall form is geometric and minimalist, with clean lines and a strong sense of rhythm in the window arrangement. No visible signage or decorative elements are present, emphasizing a sleek, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A tiered, modern office building with dark vertical window bands and a rooftop featuring solar panels, set on a lighter concrete base. Its stacked, offset volumes and minimalist facade create a striking, contemporary look.
description_view_0: This view highlights the building's stepped, offset tiers and the regular vertical window pattern, with the rooftop solar panels and mechanical area clearly visible.
description_view_1: The rear or side view shows the pronounced rotation of each tier and the lighter concrete base, with fewer visible windows and more of the rooftop equipment exposed.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the building's verticality and the consistent window arrangement, with the offset stacking of the floors visible on the left side.
description_view_3: A direct view of the building's main facade, showcasing the full height, regular window pattern, and the clean, uninterrupted lines of the exterior.
attribute_window_pattern: Highly regular, vertically oriented narrow windows in continuous horizontal bands on each floor, evenly spaced and repeated across all visible facades.
